scripts.native-host:build: dotnet publish native-host/LexiconNativeHost.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o native-host/publish/win-x64
scripts.native-host:build:mac: dotnet publish native-host/LexiconNativeHost.csproj -c Release -r osx-arm64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o native-host/publish/osx-arm64 && dotnet publish native-host/LexiconNativeHost.csproj -c Release -r osx-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o native-host/publish/osx-x64
scripts.package: npm run native-host:build && npm run youtube:build && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win
scripts.package:mac: npm run native-host:build:mac && npm run youtube:build && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac
